overview:
Google Guest Agent could be made to crash if it received specially
crafted network traffic.
description:
Jakub Ciolek discovered that the Go Cryptography module included in
Google Guest Agent did not validate GSSAPI authentication requests during
SSH operations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a
denial of service.

 

 

 

Jakub Ciolek discovered that the Go Cryptography module included in
Google Guest Agent did not validate GSSAPI authentication requests during
SSH operations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a
denial of service.
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7956-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7956-1: Google Guest Agent vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
13 January 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Google Guest Agent could be made to crash if it received specially
crafted network traffic.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

18.04 LTS

16.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 google-guest-agent - Google Compute Engine Guest Agent
 

 

 
Details

 

 

Jakub Ciolek discovered that the Go Cryptography module included in
Google Guest Agent did not validate GSSAPI authentication requests during
SSH operations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a
denial of service.

 

 

 

Jakub Ciolek discovered that the Go Cryptography module included in
Google Guest Agent did not validate GSSAPI authentication requests during
SSH operations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a
denial of service.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 google-guest-agent – 

20250506.01-0ubuntu1.1

 

 25.04

plucky

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro.

 

 18.04

LTS bionic

 google-guest-agent – 

20241011.01-0ubuntu1~18.04.0+esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 16.04

LTS xenial

 google-guest-agent – 

20240716.00-0ubuntu1~16.04.0+esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.
